steps.expected: Homepage loads with Movement Board visible
steps.observed: Homepage loaded successfully, title '首页 - 翡翠信号图谱'

steps.action: Look for Module 01 (实时异动榜) — verify table structure
steps.expected: Table with columns: 方向名称, 热度变化, 时间窗口, 置信度, 判断标签, 异动原因
steps.observed: Table present with all 6 required column headers: 方向名称, 热度变化, 时间窗口, 置信度, 判断标签, 异动原因

steps.action: Count visible directions in the Movement Board
steps.observed: 9 directions visible in the Movement Board table: 18K 金镶翡翠 (+32%), 满绿翡翠古法金搭配 (+28%), 多巴胺色系耳饰 (+24%), 蓝水翡翠简约设计 (+22%), 墨翠雕刻件 (+20%), 沉香 + 翡翠叠戴 (+18%), 翡翠珍珠混搭 (+16%), 翡翠戒面改制耳钉 (+14%), 冰感小件吊坠 (+12%)

steps.action: Verify each direction row has required fields
steps.expected: Each row shows: direction name, heat percentage, time window, confidence level, judgment tag, and reason
steps.observed: All 9 rows contain: direction name (Chinese), heat change (↑ +N%), time window (最近N天), confidence (信心: 高/中/中高), judgment badge (值得跟/观察中/需要补证据/短热噪音), and a reason paragraph

steps.action: Take focused screenshot of Movement Board module
steps.observed: Focused screenshot saved showing table with sparklines, badges, and all required fields

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8765/index.html and take above-fold screenshot
steps.expected: Above-fold content is signal-led (trend movement/direction momentum)
steps.observed: Above the fold at 1280x800: the first visible module is '实时异动榜' (Real-time Movement Board) showing trend directions with heat changes, sparklines, and judgment badges. The '今日判断' (Today's Judgment) summary is also visible. No evidence wall, no login prompt.

steps.action: Verify multi-column card-grid layout with at least 2 columns
steps.expected: At least 2 columns visible in the layout
steps.observed: Homepage uses CSS Grid with multiple grid sections: first row uses grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr (2 columns: Movement Board + Judgment Summary), subsequent sections use grid-3 (3 columns) and grid-2 (2 columns). All computed as display: grid with multiple columns (e.g., 724.8px + 483.2px for first grid).

steps.expected: Judgment badges have distinct color coding
steps.observed: Four judgment states are color-coded: 值得跟 = green (bg: rgb(209,250,229), text: rgb(16,185,129)), 观察中 = blue (bg: rgb(219,234,254), text: rgb(59,130,246)), 短热噪音 = orange (inferred from badge-warning class), 需要补证据 = gray (inferred from badge class). Badges are visible in the Movement Board and watchlist cards.

assertions.title: Homepage includes sparkline or micro-trend cues

steps.action: Look for sparkline-style visuals on the homepage
steps.expected: Sparkline SVG elements, canvas, or inline chart indicators present
steps.observed: Found 15 SVG elements total on the homepage: 9 SVGs (100×20px) in the Movement Board table rows (one per direction), and 6 SVGs (60×24px) in the '值得关注方向' watchlist cards. Each labeled '14天趋势'.

steps.action: Verify SVGs contain actual chart data (polyline points)
steps.expected: SVGs contain polyline or path elements with numerical data points
steps.observed: All SVGs contain <polyline> elements with calculated point coordinates (e.g., 'points="0,20 7.69...,17.03... 15.38...,17.77..."'), representing actual trend data rendered as mini line charts.

steps.action: Take screenshots showing sparklines in Movement Board and watchlist cards
steps.observed: Sparklines clearly visible as small green line charts next to direction names in the Movement Board table, and as '14天趋势' mini charts in watchlist cards.

assertions.title: Homepage feels like a believable stakeholder showcase

steps.action: Take full-page screenshot of the homepage
steps.expected: Full page captured for visual assessment
steps.observed: Full page screenshot captured showing all 7 modules with dense content

steps.action: Verify premium visual framing (clean design, professional typography, color scheme)
steps.observed: Clean white/light background with green accent color scheme, professional Chinese typography hierarchy (large bold headers, readable body text), card-based modular layout with consistent shadows and borders, color-coded badges with distinct styles, sparkline charts for data visualization

steps.action: Verify dense but curated content (no empty states, no 'coming soon')
steps.expected: No placeholder empty states, no 'coming soon' messages
steps.observed: DOM inspection confirmed: hasComingSoon=false, hasPlaceholder=false, hasWaitingForData=false, emptyCount=0. All 7 modules (实时异动榜, 今日判断, 值得关注方向, 风险提醒, 最近证据, 产品线观察, 14天变化) contain substantive Chinese content.

steps.expected: No login form, no 'please sign in' prompts
steps.observed: DOM inspection confirmed: loginCount=0 (no password inputs, login forms, or auth-related elements). hasSignIn=false. Page renders fully without any authentication.

steps.expected: No 'start crawl' buttons, no 'waiting for data' messages
steps.observed: DOM inspection confirmed: hasStartCrawl=false, hasWaitingForData=false. All data loaded from local jade_dashboard.json with zero console errors.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-HOME-001: Movement Board displays 9 directions (exceeds minimum of 6) with all required fields (name, heat%, time window, confidence, judgment tag, reason) and sparklines. VAL-HOME-009: Signal-first layout confirmed — Movement Board is first above-the-fold content at 1280×800, multi-column grid layout with 2+ columns, color-coded judgment badges. VAL-HOME-010: 15 SVG sparklines found — 9 in Movement Board rows and 6 in watchlist cards, all with polyline data points. VAL-HOME-011: Homepage presents polished showcase with premium design, dense curated content, zero empty states, no login/auth, no crawl dependency.
